nodes.label: Conditional Memory via Scalable Lookup: A New Axis of Sparsity for LLMs (Engram)
nodes.source_file: raw/Conditional Memory via Scalable Lookup A New Axis of Sparsity for Large Language Models.pdf
nodes.author: Cheng et al., DeepSeek-AI (2026)

nodes.label: Conditional memory = new sparsity axis complementary to MoE (conditional computation)
nodes.source_file: raw/Conditional Memory via Scalable Lookup A New Axis of Sparsity for Large Language Models.pdf

nodes.label: Engram: O(1) hashed N-gram embedding lookup with multi-head multiplicative-XOR hash and shared table E_{n,k}
nodes.source_file: raw/Conditional Memory via Scalable Lookup A New Axis of Sparsity for Large Language Models.pdf

nodes.label: Context-aware gating: hidden state is Query, retrieved memory is K/V; sigmoid gate α suppresses collision noise
nodes.source_file: raw/Conditional Memory via Scalable Lookup A New Axis of Sparsity for Large Language Models.pdf

nodes.label: U-shaped Sparsity Allocation: optimal hybrid MoE+Engram ratio beats pure MoE at iso-FLOPs
nodes.source_file: raw/Conditional Memory via Scalable Lookup A New Axis of Sparsity for Large Language Models.pdf

nodes.label: Deterministic addressing enables host-memory prefetching; 100B Engram table offloaded with <3% overhead
nodes.source_file: raw/Conditional Memory via Scalable Lookup A New Axis of Sparsity for Large Language Models.pdf

nodes.label: Mechanistic effect: Engram off-loads early-layer static reconstruction, freeing attention for global long-context (NIAH 84.2→97.0)
nodes.source_file: raw/Conditional Memory via Scalable Lookup A New Axis of Sparsity for Large Language Models.pdf
